src: 向量化是 RAG 流程的第一步。
tgt: Vectorization is the first step of the RAG pipeline.

src: 请把提示词模板存放在配置文件中。
tgt: Please store the prompt template in the configuration file.

src: 嵌入模型把文本转换成稠密向量。
tgt: The embedding model converts text into dense vectors.

src: 重排序器会对召回结果重新打分。
tgt: The reranker re-scores the retrieved results.

src: 我们使用余弦相似度来比较两个向量。
tgt: We use cosine similarity to compare two vectors.

src: 推理延迟在高并发下显著上升。
tgt: Inference latency rises noticeably under high concurrency.

src: 首 token 延迟是衡量用户体验的关键指标。
tgt: Time to first token is a key metric for user experience.

src: 量化可以在精度损失很小的情况下减少显存占用。
tgt: Quantization can reduce memory usage with minimal accuracy loss.

src: 请检查 GPU 的显存是否已经耗尽。
tgt: Please check whether the GPU memory has been exhausted.

src: 微调后的模型在领域数据上表现更好。
tgt: The fine-tuned model performs better on domain data.

src: 检索增强生成结合了检索器和生成器。
tgt: Retrieval-augmented generation combines a retriever and a generator.

src: 我们用批处理来提升吞吐量。
tgt: We use batching to improve throughput.

src: 知识库需要定期重新索引。
tgt: The knowledge base needs to be re-indexed periodically.

src: 向量数据库支持近似最近邻搜索。
tgt: The vector database supports approximate nearest neighbor search.

src: 幻觉是大语言模型常见的失败模式。
tgt: Hallucination is a common failure mode of large language models.

src: 上下文窗口限制了一次能处理的 token 数量。
tgt: The context window limits how many tokens can be processed at once.

src: 我们对评测集采用了多种子复跑来降低方差。
tgt: We re-ran the evaluation set with multiple seeds to reduce variance.

src: 请在合并代码前先通过单元测试。
tgt: Please pass the unit tests before merging the code.

src: 这个接口返回 JSON 格式的响应。
tgt: This endpoint returns a response in JSON format.

src: 我们使用容器化来保证环境一致。
tgt: We use containerization to ensure environment consistency.

src: 持续集成会在每次提交时自动运行测试。
tgt: Continuous integration runs the tests automatically on every commit.

src: 请把密钥存放在环境变量里，不要硬编码。
tgt: Please store the secret in an environment variable, not hard-coded.

src: 这个服务的可用性达到了百分之九十九点九。
tgt: This service achieves ninety-nine point nine percent availability.

src: 回滚到上一个稳定版本以恢复服务。
tgt: Roll back to the previous stable version to restore the service.

src: 负载均衡器把流量分发到多个实例。
tgt: The load balancer distributes traffic across multiple instances.

src: 我们用缓存来减少数据库的压力。
tgt: We use caching to reduce the load on the database.

src: 日志里记录了完整的请求链路。
tgt: The logs record the complete request trace.

src: 这个功能还在灰度发布阶段。
tgt: This feature is still in the canary release stage.

src: 请提交一个包含复现步骤的工单。
tgt: Please file a ticket with steps to reproduce.

src: 我们的技术支持团队会在两小时内回复。
tgt: Our technical support team will respond within two hours.

src: 您的订阅将在月底自动续费。
tgt: Your subscription will renew automatically at the end of the month.

src: 如需退款，请在七天内联系客服。
tgt: For a refund, please contact customer service within seven days.

src: 请升级到最新版本以修复这个漏洞。
tgt: Please upgrade to the latest version to fix this vulnerability.

src: 您可以在设置页面更改默认语言。
tgt: You can change the default language on the settings page.

src: 导出功能支持 CSV 和 Excel 两种格式。
tgt: The export feature supports both CSV and Excel formats.

src: 免费套餐每月有一千次调用额度。
tgt: The free tier includes a quota of one thousand calls per month.

src: 企业版提供专属的部署支持。
tgt: The enterprise edition provides dedicated deployment support.

src: 请阅读隐私政策了解我们如何处理您的数据。
tgt: Please read the privacy policy to learn how we handle your data.

src: 今天的会议改到下午两点。
tgt: Today's meeting is moved to two o'clock in the afternoon.

src: 这个季度的销售额比上一个季度增长了。
tgt: Sales this quarter grew compared with the previous quarter.

src: 我们需要在周五之前完成这份报告。
tgt: We need to finish this report before Friday.

src: 团队决定推迟产品的发布日期。
tgt: The team decided to postpone the product launch date.

src: 新员工将在下周一正式入职。
tgt: The new employee will officially start next Monday.

src: 感谢您一直以来对我们的支持。
tgt: Thank you for your continued support.

src: 请确认收到这封邮件后回复我们。
tgt: Please reply to confirm receipt of this email.

src: 由于天气原因，航班可能会延误。
tgt: Due to the weather, the flight may be delayed.

src: 他把项目的进度更新到了共享文档里。
tgt: He updated the project progress in the shared document.

src: 这份合同的有效期是两年。
tgt: This contract is valid for two years.

src: The model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on this benchmark.
tgt: 该模型在这个基准上达到了最先进的准确率。

src: Tokenization splits raw text into model-readable units.
tgt: 分词把原始文本拆分成模型可读的单元。

src: The retriever returns the top ten most relevant documents.
tgt: 检索器返回最相关的前十篇文档。

src: Lower the temperature to make the output more deterministic.
tgt: 调低温度可以让输出更确定。

src: The pipeline streams tokens back to the client in real time.
tgt: 流水线把 token 实时流式返回给客户端。

src: Please rotate the API key immediately after it is leaked.
tgt: 密钥泄露后请立即轮换 API 密钥。

src: The deployment failed because of a missing dependency.
tgt: 由于缺少依赖，部署失败了。

src: We schedule a nightly backup of the production database.
tgt: 我们为生产数据库安排了每晚一次的备份。

src: The dashboard shows latency, throughput, and error rate.
tgt: 仪表盘展示了延迟、吞吐量和错误率。

src: Your trial period ends in three days.
tgt: 您的试用期将在三天后结束。

src: Contact our sales team for a custom enterprise quote.
tgt: 如需定制的企业报价，请联系我们的销售团队。

src: All meeting notes are summarized and shared after the call.
tgt: 所有会议记录会在通话结束后整理并分享。
